stories.title: Order journey
stories.subtitle: Hello → menu → order → track → pay → review

frames.text: habari

Habari! Welcome to *Sokoni Mall AI* 🤖🇰🇪
Type *menu* to browse — pay on delivery only.
menu

📱 *Phones & Tablets*

1. Smartphones
2. Tablets
3. Power Banks

_Reply with a number_

📱 *Smartphones* (page 1)

1. {{productName}} — {{price}}
2. …more deals

_Reply 1 to order_

🛒 *Order {{productName}}*

Send *name, location & phone* in one message (pay on delivery).
Jane · Westlands Nairobi · 0712345678

Order Confirmed! 🎉
*{{orderId}}*

🛍️ {{productName}}
💰 {{price}} — pay on delivery
📍 Jane — Westlands

Pay Till *{{till}}* only when it arrives.
track

📋 *{{orderId}}* — Out for delivery 🛵

Your order is on the way. Keep your phone on.

🛵 *{{orderId}} is out for delivery!*

Inspect on arrival, then pay *{{price}}* to Till *{{till}}*.

🎉 *{{orderId}} delivered!*

Enjoy your *{{productName}}* 💚
paid

✅ Payment noted — thank you!
Our team confirms M-Pesa to Till *{{till}}* shortly.

⭐ *Rate your order {{orderId}}*

Reply 1–5 stars, or a short comment.
_Your feedback helps Sokoni grow._
5 — fast delivery, as advertised!

stories.title: Site → WhatsApp handoff
stories.subtitle: Same product, same price, same message

frames.text: 👀 Visitor tapped *Ask on WhatsApp* on sokonimall.com…
Hi Sokoni, tell me more about "{{productName}}" ({{price}}).

What next?

1. 🛒 Order (pay on delivery)
2. 🤖 Ask about it
3. ⬅ Main menu
discount

🎫 Use code *{{promoCode}}* for *{{offerPercent}}% off* eligible local orders.
Reply *yes* to apply on your next order.
yes
✅ Code *{{promoCode}}* noted — {{offerPercent}}% off on next eligible order.
referral

Share Sokoni with friends — pay-on-delivery, zero deposits.
You both benefit when they order via Till *{{till}}*.

🛡️ *Trust checklist*
• Pay on delivery only
• Till *{{till}}* — {{tillName}}
• Verify {{whatsappDisplay}} before paying
🛒 Send *name, location & phone* to place your order (COD).
Peter · Kisumu · 0722111222

✅ *{{orderId}}* confirmed!
We'll WhatsApp you at every step.
📦 *{{orderId}} packed* — waiting for rider.
Same catalog on web & WhatsApp — always in sync.
menu

🌍 *Shop International*

1. Trending picks
2. Tell me what you need

_No pay-on-delivery for overseas items._
wireless earbuds under $20

🛒 Buy via partner link (AliExpress / Temu / Amazon).
_Sokoni may earn affiliate commission — never costs you extra._
⚠️ *Import note:* Kenya duty/VAT may apply on arrival — paid by you, not included in price.
scam

🛡️ Sokoni is a real Kenyan business.
Till *{{till}}* registered to *{{tillName}}*.
Verify {{whatsappDisplay}} before any payment.

Local store items = pay on delivery.
International = partner checkout only.
menu
Back to *local* pay-on-delivery catalog 🇰🇪
💵 *COD badge* = inspect first, pay Till *{{till}}* on delivery.
Full terms: sokonimall.com/terms

stories.title: Human & admin support
stories.subtitle: Handoff → admin updates → you get notified

frames.text: menu

🙋 *Connecting you to Sokoni support…*

A team member will reply on this chat.
_Meanwhile type *track* or your order number._

📋 *SK-1042*
Status: *Confirmed* ✅
{{productName}} — {{price}}

We'll notify you when it's packed & out for delivery.

👤 *Sokoni team*
Habari Jane — your order is confirmed. Rider assigned shortly. 🙏

📦 *SK-1042 packed!*
Your item is ready and waiting for a rider.

🔄 *Admin update* (behind the scenes)
`#status SK-1042 out_for_delivery`

🛵 *SK-1042 is out for delivery!*

Inspect on arrival. Pay *{{price}}* to Till *{{till}}* only.
Can I change delivery to Kilimani?

👤 *Sokoni team*
Noted — we'll try before dispatch. Reply with landmark if rider is already close.

🎉 *SK-1042 delivered!*
Enjoy your purchase 💚
paid

✅ *Payment received* — thank you!
Admin confirmed your M-Pesa to Till *{{till}}*.

⭐ How was your experience?
Reply 1–5 for order *SK-1042*.
Asante! Real humans + AI — same WhatsApp chat. 🤝
👀 Browsing *Shop by Category* on sokonimall.com…
Tap *Phones & Tablets* → *Smartphones*, *Tablets*, *Power Banks*…
Scroll real deals — prices match WhatsApp. 💵 Pay on delivery on every item.
Hi Sokoni, I'm looking for "camera phone chini ya 15k" — pay on delivery.
Same catalog on web & WhatsApp — discover on site, checkout in chat.

📍 *Site application submitted* — ref *PP-2026-0042*

Continue on WhatsApp for step-by-step confirmation.
pickup menu

📦 *Pickup point application* (step 1/10)

Shop name from site: *Mama Grace Electronics*
Reply *yes* to keep or type a new name.
yes
Step 2 — County: *Embu* (from site). Reply *yes* or send new county.
yes

Step 3 — Address & hours prefilled.
Secure storage: *yes* · Collect M-Pesa: *yes*

Step 10 — *Review & submit*

🏪 Mama Grace Electronics
📍 Embu · Mon–Sat 8am–7pm
💰 KES 50+ per parcel

Reply *submit* to send.
submit

✅ *Application submitted!*
Reference: *PP-2026-0042*
We'll WhatsApp you within 48 hours.

🏪 *Site application* — ref *SUP-2026-0018*

Open WhatsApp to finish with every field prefilled.
vendor menu
Reply *1* to start supplier application (same as sokonimall.com/suppliers).

Step 1 — Business: *Nairobi Tech Hub* (from site)
Reply *yes* or send new name.
yes

Step 8 — Product: *{{productName}}* · supply prefilled.
Category & price carried from your site form.

Step 10 — *Review & submit*

🏢 Nairobi Tech Hub · Nairobi
📦 {{productName}} — supply KES 12,500

Reply *submit*.
submit

✅ *Application submitted!*
Reference: *SUP-2026-0018*
Type *vendor menu* after approval.
